# Anduril Awarded Contract to Redefine the Future of Mixed Reality

Anduril Industries announced today that it has been awarded a $159 million contract by the U.S. Army for an initial prototyping period to develop a night vision and mixed reality system as part of the Soldier Borne Mission Command (formerly IVAS Next) program.
